title: Damaged Daylight HLT4 Frame — The Last HLT4
collection: Harry’s Room — The Harry Leary Collection
description: A damaged metallic green Daylight frame marked “HL TURBO 4,” presented by the collection as the last HLT4. Its damaged state is part of the preserved record rather than something concealed.
provenance_summary: Presented as part of the Harry Leary Collection; acquisition detail was not supplied in this source package.
qualifications: The HL TURBO 4 marking and visible damage are present in the supplied image.
“The Last HLT4” is a collection attribution; production documentation was not supplied with this release.
